header.title: Frequently Asked Questions
header.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions

general.a1: Calmika is an all-in-one autism development app for children aged 2–7. It includes 30+ modules — from AAC communication and visual schedules to music therapy and coloring — available in 3 languages (HU/EN/PL), and works fully offline.
general.a2: Calmika is designed for parents of children with ASD (Autism Spectrum Disorder), therapists, and speech-language pathologists. It also helps any child experiencing speech delays or communication difficulties.
general.q3: What devices does it run on?
general.a3: Available on Android 8.0 (Oreo) and newer phones and tablets. An iOS (iPhone / iPad) version is in development — coming soon!
general.a4: No, and it never will. Advertising in a children's app is unacceptable — this is our ethical principle, not a marketing pitch.
general.a5: Currently fully available in 3 languages: Hungarian, English, and Polish (AAC + UI). Partial UI support (93%) for German, Spanish, French, and Italian. Dual language mode lets children learn in two languages simultaneously.

pricing.a1: The basic version is completely free. Pro subscription: 1,990 HUF/mo (Hungary) | €5.99/mo (EU) | $7.99/mo (US). Save with annual billing: 14,990 HUF | €49.99 | $59.99.
pricing.a2: Yes! Get 14 days of full Pro access — no credit card required. No hidden conditions, just try everything.
pricing.a3: The AAC Lite package (80 core words) and the Calm Corner module are permanently free. This is our ethical principle: every child deserves free access to basic communication tools.
pricing.q4: How do I cancel my subscription?
pricing.a4: Cancel anytime through the Google Play Store or App Store subscription manager with a single click. No cancellation fees, no complicated process.

therapists.q1: How do I get free access as a therapist?
therapists.a1: Visit the /terapeutaknak page and fill out the registration form. We'll send you a Pro activation code within 24 hours — valid for 10 devices for 1 year, completely free.
therapists.q2: Can I use Calmika during therapy sessions?
therapists.a2: Yes, that's exactly what it was designed for! Calmika works fully offline and is optimized for tablets — perfect for therapeutic environments without internet access.

privacy.a1: Minimal data. We collect no personal child data — developmental data is stored exclusively on your device, offline. For full details, visit the /adatvedelem privacy policy page.
privacy.a2: Yes. There is no tracking and no third-party analytics on Calmika's child-facing interface. We comply with COPPA (USA) and GDPR (EU) regulations.

contact.notFound: Didn't find the answer you were looking for?

story.quote: My twin sons, Alex and Olivia, were diagnosed with autism at age 2. As a parent, the first months are the hardest — everyone says something different, apps are expensive, and most don't even support Hungarian. That's why I started building Calmika: so that one app can provide everything an ASD family needs.

hero.title: The Calmika Story
hero.subtitle: Built by a dad of autistic twins — not a corporate product, but made with a parent's heart.

y2022.title: The Diagnosis
y2022.text: My twins were diagnosed with autism at age two. The first months were complete chaos — running from one doctor to the next, everyone saying something different. Online, I found only expensive English-language apps that couldn't even meet our needs.

y2023.title: The Idea
y2023.text: While working night shifts, I started learning to code during the day. I wasn't a developer — but I was a dad, and that was motivation enough. The idea was simple: one app that does everything, in our language, without costing a fortune.

y2024.title: The Build
y2024.text: Flutter, Dart, and a lot of learning. First an AAC communication board, then schedules, emotions, coloring, music therapy... The list kept growing, because an ASD family needs ALL of this — not just one piece of the puzzle.

y2025.title: Calmika
y2025.text: Today Calmika has 30+ modules, is fully available in 3 languages (HU/EN/PL), and AAC communication + Calm Corner will remain free forever. Because communication is a basic right — not a luxury.

noAds.title: Zero Ads
noAds.description: Ads in a kids app? Never.

team.description: I build Calmika alone, in my free time. There's no company or investor behind me — just a dad who wanted something better for his kids. And what's good for my twins might be good for other ASD families too.

evidence.sectionSubtitle: Calmika's modules are grounded in scientific evidence
badges: AAC use increases language development in children with ASD (Romski & Sevcik, 2005)
Visual schedules reduce anxiety and improve transitions (Mesibov et al., 2005)
Music therapy improves social interaction in ASD (Geretsegger et al., 2014)
Multi-modal apps support diverse learning needs (Light & McNaughton, 2014)

items.question: Can every therapist get free access?
items.answer: Yes — speech-language pathologists, special educators, developmental educators, and psychologists are all eligible. The only requirement is that you demonstrably work with children with ASD.

items.question: How long is the Pro code valid?
items.answer: 1 year, on 10 devices. We'll notify you before it expires and typically renew it — our goal is long-term, trust-based collaboration with professionals.

items.question: What modules are included in the therapist Pro?
items.answer: Everything: AAC communication (5000+ words), visual schedule, music therapy, emotions & Zones, social stories, coloring, cognitive games, vocabulary learning — 30+ modules in total.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Clear, human language — not legal jargon.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: This privacy policy describes how Calmika — operated by Dávid Kovács, sole trader (Hungary) — handles personal data on the calmika.com website and in the Calmika mobile app.
s1.p2: Data is processed solely for operating and improving the app and website. We do not sell data to third parties, and we do not use targeted advertising systems.

s2.title: 2. What data do we collect?
s2.item1: Email address — only if you provide it yourself (e.g. beta registration, contact form)
s2.item2: Device type — for anonymous analytics (Vercel Analytics)
s2.p2: We do not automatically collect any other personal data.

s3.title: 3. Children's data — IMPORTANT
s3.highlight: 🛡️ We do NOT collect personal data about children. The app works locally; data stays on the device — it never reaches our servers.
s3.p1: Children's profile data (name, age, preferences), developmental records and usage history are stored exclusively on the device, in offline mode. We cannot see, store, or access this data.
s3.p2: This isn't just a legal obligation (COPPA, GDPR) — it's our ethical principle. In an app built for children, privacy comes first.

s4.title: 4. Cookies
s4.item1: Language preference — to remember your selected language
s4.item2: Anonymous analytics — page visit counts via Vercel Analytics (no personal data)

s5.title: 5. Third parties
s5.item1: Vercel Analytics — anonymous page visit statistics (IP is not stored)
s5.item2: RevenueCat — subscription management (payment data is handled by Play Store / App Store, not us)
s5.p2: No other third party has access to your data.

s6.title: 6. Data deletion
s6.p1: If you'd like to delete your email address or any other data we hold, contact us:

s7.title: 7. Contact
s7.p1: For privacy questions or deletion requests, reach us at:

s8.title: 8. Changes
s8.p1: If we make significant changes to this policy, we'll notify you by email (if you provided your address) and update the "Last updated" date. Minor, non-material changes will not be announced separately.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms and conditions for using the Calmika app and website.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: Welcome to Calmika! These Terms of Service govern the use of the Calmika mobile app and website (calmika.com).
s1.p2: By downloading and using the app, you agree to these terms. If you disagree, please do not use the app.

s2.title: 2. About the app
s2.p1: Calmika is an educational and developmental app designed for children with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). The app includes AAC communication tools, visual schedules, music therapy, emotion recognition, and other developmental modules.
s2.disclaimer: ⚠️ Calmika is NOT a medical device and does NOT provide diagnosis. The app supplements but does not replace professional medical or therapeutic care. Always consult a qualified professional regarding your child's development.

s3.title: 3. Subscription
s3.p1: Calmika is available in two tiers:
s3.item1: Free plan — AAC Lite and Calm Corner are free forever
s3.item2: Pro plan — monthly or annual subscription with a 14-day free trial (reverse trial, no credit card required)
s3.item3: After the trial, if you don't subscribe, the app automatically reverts to the Free plan
s3.p2: The subscription renews automatically each period unless cancelled at least 24 hours before renewal via Google Play Store or App Store.

s4.title: 4. Refunds
s4.p1: Refunds are processed according to Google Play Store and Apple App Store refund policies. Platforms handle refund requests directly.
s4.p2: If you're unsatisfied within the first 7 days of subscribing, contact us directly at hello@calmika.com — we'll do our best to resolve the issue.

s5.title: 5. Intellectual property
s5.p1: The Calmika brand, logo, app code, AAC symbol library, audio content, and all other materials are the intellectual property of Dávid Kovács. Copying, distributing, or commercial use of any content is prohibited without prior written permission.

s6.title: 6. Limitation of liability
s6.p1: Calmika is provided "as is". We accept no liability for direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the app, including data loss or missed developmental outcomes. The app is a supplementary tool and does not replace professional therapy.

s7.title: 7. Governing law
s7.p1: These Terms are governed by Hungarian law. Disputes will first be resolved by mutual agreement; if unsuccessful, the competent Hungarian court shall have jurisdiction.

s8.title: 8. Changes
s8.p1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms. For significant changes, we'll notify you by email or in-app. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
